CREATE TABLE test_strings (input String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('äöüß'), ('München'), ('ÜBER'), ('hello'), ('你好'), ('こんにちは'), ('Привет'), ('नमस्ते');
SELECT upperUTF8(input) AS UpperUTF8 FROM test_strings;
SELECT input, upperUTF8(input) FROM test_strings WHERE length(input) > 5;
SELECT DISTINCT upperUTF8(input) FROM test_strings GROUP BY length(input);
WITH (SELECT upperUTF8(input) FROM test_strings) AS upper_results SELECT * FROM upper_results WHERE upper_results IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (id Int32, value String);
INSERT INTO mixed_data VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, 'München'), (3, 'тест');
SELECT md.id, upperUTF8(md.value) AS UpperValue FROM mixed_data md JOIN test_strings ts ON md.value = ts.input;
SELECT upperUTF8((SELECT input FROM test_strings WHERE input LIKE 'M%')) AS SubqueryUpper;
SELECT upperUTF8(CONCAT(input, ' test')) AS ComplexUpper FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE utf8_test (str String, length Int32);
INSERT INTO utf8_test SELECT input, length(input) FROM test_strings;
SELECT upperUTF8(str) AS UpperStr, length(str) AS OriginalLength FROM utf8_test WHERE OriginalLength < 5;
WITH (SELECT upperUTF8('İstanbul')) AS converted_value SELECT converted_value, length(converted_value) AS ConvertedLength;
SELECT upperUTF8(nil) AS NullCheck;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (edge_case String);
INSERT INTO edge_cases VALUES (''), ('a'), ('A'), ('ß'), ('ẞ'), ('ç'), ('İ'), ('i');
SELECT edge_case, upperUTF8(edge_case) AS UpperEdgeCase FROM edge_cases;
SELECT upperUTF8(CONCAT(input, ' ', input)) AS DoubleConcatUpper FROM test_strings;
SELECT upperUTF8(trimming.value) FROM (SELECT TRIM(input) AS value FROM test_strings) AS trimming;
